Trigger.Name: WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895683 section
--
if not( :ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID IS NOT NULL ) then
 message( 'WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM trigger failed on field - ' || :system.trigger_field );
 raise form_trigger_failure;
end if;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895683 section
--

Trigger.Name: WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895684 section
--
if not( :ME_ORA_FORM.LEGACY_APP_ID IS NOT NULL ) then
 message( 'WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM trigger failed on field - ' || :system.trigger_field );
 raise form_trigger_failure;
end if;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895684 section
--
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint FK_ME_ORA_FORM_APP section
--
declare
 cursor primary_cur is select 'x' from Y055490.ME_LEGACY_APPLICATION
 where LEGACY_APP_ID = :ME_ORA_FORM.LEGACY_APP_ID;
 primary_dummy char(1);
begin
 if ( ( :ME_ORA_FORM.LEGACY_APP_ID is not null ) ) then
 open primary_cur;
 fetch primary_cur into primary_dummy;
 if ( not primary_cur%found ) then
 message('Foreign key value does not currently exist in the primary key table.');
 close primary_cur;
 raise form_trigger_failure;
 end if;
 close primary_cur;
 end if;
end;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint FK_ME_ORA_FORM_APP section
--

Trigger.Name: WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895685 section
--
if not( :ME_ORA_FORM.FORM_CODE IS NOT NULL ) then
 message( 'WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM trigger failed on field - ' || :system.trigger_field );
 raise form_trigger_failure;
end if;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895685 section
--

Trigger.Name: WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895686 section
--
if not( :ME_ORA_FORM.FORM_NAME IS NOT NULL ) then
 message( 'WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM trigger failed on field - ' || :system.trigger_field );
 raise form_trigger_failure;
end if;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895686 section
--

Trigger.Name: WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895687 section
--
if not( :ME_ORA_FORM.MODULE_NAME IS NOT NULL ) then
 message( 'WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM trigger failed on field - ' || :system.trigger_field );
 raise form_trigger_failure;
end if;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895687 section
--

Trigger.Name: WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895688 section
--
if not( :ME_ORA_FORM.BUSINESS_PURPOSE IS NOT NULL ) then
 message( 'WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM trigger failed on field - ' || :system.trigger_field );
 raise form_trigger_failure;
end if;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895688 section
--

Trigger.Name: WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895689 section
--
if not( :ME_ORA_FORM.MIGRATION_STATUS IS NOT NULL ) then
 message( 'WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM trigger failed on field - ' || :system.trigger_field );
 raise form_trigger_failure;
end if;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint SYS_C001895689 section
--

Trigger.Name: KEY-DELREC
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint PK_ME_ORA_FORM section
--
declare
 cursor primary_cur is select 'x' from Y055490.ME_CASE_FORM
 where ORA_FORM_ID = :ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID;
 primary_dummy char(1);
begin
 if ( ( :ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID is not null ) ) then
 open primary_cur;
 fetch primary_cur into primary_dummy;
 if ( primary_cur%found ) then
 message('Cannot delete master record when matching detail records exist.');
 close primary_cur;
 raise form_trigger_failure;
 end if;
 close primary_cur;
 end if;
end;
 

--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint PK_ME_ORA_FORM section
--
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint PK_ME_ORA_FORM section
--
declare
 cursor primary_cur is select 'x' from Y055490.ME_ORA_BLOCK
 where ORA_FORM_ID = :ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID;
 primary_dummy char(1);
begin
 if ( ( :ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID is not null ) ) then
 open primary_cur;
 fetch primary_cur into primary_dummy;
 if ( primary_cur%found ) then
 message('Cannot delete master record when matching detail records exist.');
 close primary_cur;
 raise form_trigger_failure;
 end if;
 close primary_cur;
 end if;
end;
 

--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint PK_ME_ORA_FORM section
--
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity constraint PK_ME_ORA_FORM section
--
declare
 cursor primary_cur is select 'x' from Y055490.ME_ORA_CODE_OBJECT
 where ORA_FORM_ID = :ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID;
 primary_dummy char(1);
begin
 if ( ( :ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID is not null ) ) then
 open primary_cur;
 fetch primary_cur into primary_dummy;
 if ( primary_cur%found ) then
 message('Cannot delete master record when matching detail records exist.');
 close primary_cur;
 raise form_trigger_failure;
 end if;
 close primary_cur;
 end if;
end;
delete_record;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity constraint PK_ME_ORA_FORM section
--

Trigger.Name: WHEN-CREATE-RECORD
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default enforce data integrity default section
--
:ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID := "Y055490"."ISEQ$$_6357826".nextval;
--
-- End default enforce data integrity default section
--

Trigger.Name: ON-POPULATE-DETAILS
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default relation declare section
--
DECLARE
 recstat VARCHAR2(20) := :System.record_status; 
 startitm VARCHAR2(61 CHAR) := :System.cursor_item; 
 rel_id Relation;
--
-- End default relation declare section
--
--
-- Begin default relation program section
--
BEGIN
 IF ( recstat = 'NEW' or recstat = 'INSERT' ) THEN 
 RETURN;
 END IF;
 --
 -- Begin ME_ORA_BLOCK detail program section
 --
 IF ( (:ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID is not null) ) THEN 
 rel_id := Find_Relation('ME_ORA_FORM.ME_ORA_FORM_ME_ORA_BLOCK'); 
 Query_Master_Details(rel_id, 'ME_ORA_BLOCK'); 
 END IF;
 --
 -- End ME_ORA_BLOCK detail program section
 --

 IF ( :System.cursor_item <> startitm ) THEN 
 Go_Item(startitm); 
 Check_Package_Failure; 
 END IF;
END;
--
-- End default relation program section
--

Trigger.Name: ON-CHECK-DELETE-MASTER
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default relation declare section
--
DECLARE
 Dummy_Define CHAR(1);
 --
 -- Begin ME_ORA_BLOCK detail declare section
 --
 CURSOR ME_ORA_BLOCK_cur IS 
 SELECT 1 FROM ME_ORA_BLOCK M 
 WHERE M.ORA_FORM_ID = :ME_ORA_FORM.ORA_FORM_ID;
 --
 -- End ME_ORA_BLOCK detail declare section
 --
--
-- End default relation declare section
--
--
-- Begin default relation program section
--
BEGIN
 --
 -- Begin ME_ORA_BLOCK detail program section
 --
 OPEN ME_ORA_BLOCK_cur; 
 FETCH ME_ORA_BLOCK_cur INTO Dummy_Define; 
 IF ( ME_ORA_BLOCK_cur%found ) THEN 
 Message('Cannot delete master record when matching detail records exist.'); 
 CLOSE ME_ORA_BLOCK_cur; 
 RAISE Form_Trigger_Failure; 
 END IF;
 CLOSE ME_ORA_BLOCK_cur;
 --
 -- End ME_ORA_BLOCK detail program section
 --
END;
--
-- End default relation program section
--

ProgramUnit.Name: CHECK_PACKAGE_FAILURE
ProgramUnit.ProgramUnitText:
Procedure Check_Package_Failure IS
BEGIN
 IF NOT ( Form_Success ) THEN
 RAISE Form_Trigger_Failure;
 END IF;
END;

ProgramUnit.Name: QUERY_MASTER_DETAILS
ProgramUnit.ProgramUnitText:
PROCEDURE Query_Master_Details(rel_id Relation,detail VARCHAR2) IS
 oldmsg VARCHAR2(2); -- Old Message Level Setting
 reldef VARCHAR2(5); -- Relation Deferred Setting
BEGIN
 --
 -- Initialize Local Variable(s)
 --
 reldef := Get_Relation_Property(rel_id, DEFERRED_COORDINATION);
 oldmsg := :System.Message_Level;
 --
 -- If NOT Deferred, Goto detail and execute the query.
 --
 IF reldef = 'FALSE' THEN
 Go_Block(detail);
 Check_Package_Failure;
 :System.Message_Level := '10';
 Execute_Query;
 :System.Message_Level := oldmsg;
 ELSE
 --
 -- Relation is deferred, mark the detail block as un-coordinated
 --
 Set_Block_Property(detail, COORDINATION_STATUS, NON_COORDINATED);
 END IF;

EXCEPTION
 WHEN Form_Trigger_Failure THEN
 :System.Message_Level := oldmsg;
 RAISE;
END Query_Master_Details;

ProgramUnit.Name: CLEAR_ALL_MASTER_DETAILS
ProgramUnit.ProgramUnitText:
PROCEDURE Clear_All_Master_Details IS
 mastblk VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Initial Master Block Causing Coord
 coordop VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Operation Causing the Coord
 trigblk VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Cur Block On-Clear-Details Fires On
 startitm VARCHAR2(61 CHAR); -- Item in which cursor started
 frmstat VARCHAR2(15); -- Form Status
 curblk VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Current Block
 currel VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Current Relation
 curdtl VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Current Detail Block

 FUNCTION First_Changed_Block_Below(Master VARCHAR2)
 RETURN VARCHAR2 IS
 curblk VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Current Block
 currel VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Current Relation
 retblk VARCHAR2(30 CHAR); -- Return Block
 BEGIN
 --
 -- Initialize Local Vars
 --
 curblk := Master;
 currel := Get_Block_Property(curblk, FIRST_MASTER_RELATION);
 --
 -- While there exists another relation for this block
 --
 WHILE currel IS NOT NULL LOOP
 --
 -- Get the name of the detail block
 --
 curblk := Get_Relation_Property(currel, DETAIL_NAME);
 --
 -- If this block has changes, return its name
 --
 IF ( Get_Block_Property(curblk, STATUS) = 'CHANGED' ) THEN
 RETURN curblk;
 ELSE
 --
 -- No changes, recursively look for changed blocks below
 --
 retblk := First_Changed_Block_Below(curblk);
 --
 -- If some block below is changed, return its name
 --
 IF retblk IS NOT NULL THEN
 RETURN retblk;
 ELSE
 --
 -- Consider the next relation
 --
 currel := Get_Relation_Property(currel, NEXT_MASTER_RELATION);
 END IF;
 END IF;
 END LOOP;

 --
 -- No changed blocks were found
 --
 RETURN NULL;
 END First_Changed_Block_Below;

BEGIN
 --
 -- Init Local Vars
 --
 mastblk := :System.Master_Block;
 coordop := :System.Coordination_Operation;
 trigblk := :System.Trigger_Block;
 startitm := :System.Cursor_Item;
 frmstat := :System.Form_Status;

 --
 -- If the coordination operation is anything but CLEAR_RECORD or
 -- SYNCHRONIZE_BLOCKS, then continue checking.
 --
 IF coordop NOT IN ('CLEAR_RECORD', 'SYNCHRONIZE_BLOCKS') THEN
 --
 -- If we're processing the driving master block...
 --
 IF mastblk = trigblk THEN
 --
 -- If something in the form is changed, find the
 -- first changed block below the master
 --
 IF frmstat = 'CHANGED' THEN
 curblk := First_Changed_Block_Below(mastblk);
 --
 -- If we find a changed block below, go there
 -- and Ask to commit the changes.
 --
 IF curblk IS NOT NULL THEN
 Go_Block(curblk);
 Check_Package_Failure;
 Clear_Block(ASK_COMMIT);
 --
 -- If user cancels commit dialog, raise error
 --
 IF NOT ( :System.Form_Status = 'QUERY'
 OR :System.Block_Status = 'NEW' ) THEN
 RAISE Form_Trigger_Failure;
 END IF;
 END IF;
 END IF;
 END IF;
 END IF;

 --
 -- Clear all the detail blocks for this master without
 -- any further asking to commit.
 --
 currel := Get_Block_Property(trigblk, FIRST_MASTER_RELATION);
 WHILE currel IS NOT NULL LOOP
 curdtl := Get_Relation_Property(currel, DETAIL_NAME);
 IF Get_Block_Property(curdtl, STATUS) <> 'NEW' THEN
 Go_Block(curdtl);
 Check_Package_Failure;
 Clear_Block(NO_VALIDATE);
 IF :System.Block_Status <> 'NEW' THEN
 RAISE Form_Trigger_Failure;
 END IF;
 END IF;
 currel := Get_Relation_Property(currel, NEXT_MASTER_RELATION);
 END LOOP;

 --
 -- Put cursor back where it started
 --
 IF :System.Cursor_Item <> startitm THEN
 Go_Item(startitm);
 Check_Package_Failure;
 END IF;

EXCEPTION
 WHEN Form_Trigger_Failure THEN
 IF :System.Cursor_Item <> startitm THEN
 Go_Item(startitm);
 END IF;
 RAISE;

END Clear_All_Master_Details;

Trigger.Name: ON-CLEAR-DETAILS
Trigger.TriggerText:
--
-- Begin default relation program section
--
BEGIN
 Clear_All_Master_Details;
END;
--
-- End default relation program section
--
